title: Cuneiform Tablet #0737: Early Dynastic Ration List
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a ration list document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a ration list document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Ration List document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records ration list matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
